title: Fixing GIT Tag Name Validation for Long Names

statement.markdown: Implement a function that validates a GIT tag name. A valid GIT tag name must be a string that does not contain any whitespace characters and is not longer than 50 characters. The function should return true if the tag name is valid, and false otherwise. Note that the tag name is case-sensitive.
statement.inputFormat: A single string input representing the GIT tag name.
statement.outputFormat: A boolean output indicating whether the tag name is valid.
statement.notes: The time complexity of the function should be O(n), where n is the length of the input string.

constraints.description: Maximum length of the input string

examples.explanation: The tag name contains a whitespace character.
The tag name is longer than 50 characters.

hints.text: Use a regular expression to check for whitespace characters.
